workflows.description: Retrieve a list of audit logs from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the specified filter parameters.
workflows.name: Get All Audit Logs

workflows.description: Retrieve specific audit log details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the provided audit log ID.
workflows.name: Get Audit Log Details

workflows.description: Retrieve a list of audit log actors or types from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the audit log metadata and other filter parameter you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Audit Log Actors/Types

workflows.description: Retrieve a list of git users from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the git type and other filter parameters you have specified.
workflows.name: Get All Git Users

workflows.description: Retrieve specific git user details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the git type and it's ID specified.
workflows.name: Get Git User Details

workflows.description: Creates a new keyword in the GitGuardian Enterprise server, it will be in PENDING state until GitGuardian approves or refuses the keyword.
workflows.name: Create Keyword

workflows.description: Retrieve a list of keywords from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the specified filter parameters.
workflows.name: Get All Keywords

workflows.description: Retrieve specific keyword details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the keyword type and it's ID specified.
workflows.name: Get Keyword Details

workflows.description: Update a specific keyword details in the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the keyword type, name, labels, and it's ID specified.
workflows.name: Update Keyword Details

workflows.description: Deletes a specific keyword from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the keyword type and it's ID specified.
workflows.name: Delete Keyword

workflows.description: Exports the keyword as CSV file from the GitGuardian Enterprise server.
workflows.name: Export Keywords

workflows.description: Retrieve a list of incident secrets from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the specified filter parameters.
workflows.name: Get All Incident Secrets

workflows.description: Retrieve specific incident secret details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the provided incident secret ID.
workflows.name: Get Incident Secret Details

workflows.description: Updates a specific incident secret details in the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the provided incident secret ID and status.
workflows.name: Update Incident Secret Status

workflows.description: Create a public link for the incident to request feedback from anyone outside of the platform using the provided incident secret ID.
workflows.name: Create Incident Secret Shared Link

routes.name: Start-> Create Incident Secret Shared Link

workflows.description: Delete any of the previously created links, and create a fresh one using the provided incident secret ID.
workflows.name: Rotate Incident Secret Shared Link

routes.name: Start-> Rotate Incident Secret Shared Link

workflows.description: Deactivate and delete a given shared link using the provided incident secret ID.
workflows.name: Delete Incident Secret Shared Link

routes.name: Start-> Delete Incident Secret Shared Link

workflows.description: Retrieve a list of incident keywords from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the specified filter parameters.
workflows.name: Get All Incident Keywords

workflows.description: Retrieve specific incident keyword details from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the incident keyword ID specified.
workflows.name: Get Incident Keyword Details

workflows.description: Updates a specific incident keyword details in the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the provided incident keyword ID and status.
workflows.name: Update Incident Keyword Status

workflows.description: Retrieve specific incident secret note from the GitGuardian Enterprise server using the provided incident secret ID.
workflows.name: Get Incident Secret Note

workflows.description: Retrieve specific incident keyword note from the GitGuardian Enterprise server based on the incident keyword ID specified.
workflows.name: Get Incident Keyword Note

workflows.description: Sends an API request to an API endpoint based on specified HTTP method, endpoint, and other input parameters that you have specified, enabling flexible API interactions tailored to user needs.
workflows.name: Execute an API Request

data.name: Sample - GitGuardian Enterprise - 1.0.0
data.description: GitGuardian Enterprise is a security platform designed to detect, monitor, and remediate secrets (like API keys, passwords, and tokens) and sensitive data exposed in source code, CI/CD pipelines, containers, and developer environments.
